task: Create a new unconstrained full-stack application with local relational storage.
Fix a component-local click interaction in an existing Vue TypeScript application that is reproducible with Vue Test Utils and does not depend on browser navigation, layout, or native browser APIs.
Add a forward SQLite migration and prove backup restore for a real local database.
Create a new Go CLI with subcommands and completion.
Add a package and app output to an existing pure Nix flake.
In a project-owned GitHub Actions workflow on a one-use GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner, an image build is proven to exceed runner disk; add the guarded Nix workflow shell steps for disk preparation.
Attach a screenshot to explain a frontend bug, then update the component test.
Perform AI screenshot visual QA for a web UI across desktop and mobile states without implementing fixes.
Regenerate a Flutter Rust bridge and verify both consumers.
Update a runtime dependency through the project's declared dependency tool after checking its registry metadata, license, install behavior, and generated lockfile diff.
Perform one named manual edit on one active dependency lockfile after reading and verifying that the applicable project overlay explicitly requires that exact operation.
The declared formatter is missing from the dev shell PATH and blocks validation.

Implement a new explicitly selected Rust HTTP service boundary that performs read-only queries against an existing concurrent SQLite schema; do not change schema, migrations, backup, restore, import/export, database path, or reset behavior.
Refresh an ordered patch series in an existing Nix-backed patch repository against a pinned upstream revision without tracking the checkout.
Change an existing Go worker that shares a result map across goroutines.
Change an existing documented JSON API's normalization of untrusted client-provided filenames and its event-timestamp behavior.
Change treefmt configuration in an existing Nix repository and validate that repository-wide formatting introduces no unrelated churn.
